31-4268320*u^4*x^30+2902760*u^4*x^29-1561915*u^4*x^28+643545*u^4*x^27-195375*u^4*x^26+41310*u^4*x^25-5505*u^4*x^24+370*u^4*x^23-5*u^4*x^22-8*u^3*x^55+160*u^3*x^54-1464*u^3*x^53+8192*u^3*x^52-32032*u^3*x^51+98092*u^3*x^50-272760*u^3*x^49+790696*u^3*x^48-2366256*u^3*x^47+6496404*u^3*x^46-15033784*u^3*x^45+28456860*u^3*x^44-43926852*u^3*x^43+55706180*u^3*x^42-58746368*u^3*x^41+52358672*u^3*x^40-40255320*u^3*x^39+27272676*u^3*x^38-16411540*u^3*x^37+8509508*u^3*x^36-3490172*u^3*x^35+1085652*u^3*x^34-632000*u^3*x^33+1014064*u^3*x^32-1253528*u^3*x^31+1041152*u^3*x^30-610404*u^3*x^29+257544*u^3*x^28-77240*u^3*x^27+15716*u^3*x^26-1952*u^3*x^25+112*u^3*x^24-15*u^2*x^52+453*u^2*x^51-5799*u^2*x^50+43260*u^2*x^49-214989*u^2*x^48+767610*u^2*x^47-2069964*u^2*x^46+4375908*u^2*x^45-7479759*u^2*x^44+10630665*u^2*x^43-12894378*u^2*x^42+13653417*u^2*x^41-12813318*u^2*x^40+10683897*u^2*x^39-7806099*u^2*x^38+4847724*u^2*x^37-2452680*u^2*x^36+990897*u^2*x^35-396207*u^2*x^34+289389*u^2*x^33-291699*u^2*x^32+235875*u^2*x^31-138087*u^2*x^30+58134*u^2*x^29-17316*u^2*x^28+3483*u^2*x^27-426*u^2*x^26+24*u^2*x^25+26*u*x^52-490*u*x^51+4254*u*x^50-22724*u*x^49+84222*u*x^48-231816*u*x^47+496256*u*x^46-856998*u*x^45+1233762*u*x^44-1528306*u*x^43+1677438*u*x^42-1667678*u*x^41+1515264*u*x^40-1251226*u*x^39+925024*u*x^38-603138*u*x^37+345930*u*x^36-179720*u*x^35+91442*u*x^34-49238*u*x^33+27026*u*x^32-13270*u*x^31+5200*u*x^30-1504*u*x^29+298*u*x^28-36*u*x^27+2*u*x^26+x^53-18*x^52+148*x^51-741*x^50+2540*x^49-6358*x^48+12142*x^47-18414*x^46+23410*x^45-27202*x^44+32033*x^43-39741*x^42+48958*x^41-55368*x^40+54839*x^39-46441*x^38+33033*x^37-19336*x^36+9075*x^35-3302*x^34+890*x^33-166*x^32+19*x^31-x^30)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
